properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1 v6 v1 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Give me that old time religion, Give me that old time religion, Give me that old time religion, And it’s good enough for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It was good for our mothers. It was good for our mothers. It was good for our mothers And it’s good enough for me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Makes me love everybody. Makes me love everybody. Makes me love everybody And it’s good enough for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It was good for prophet Daniel, It was good for prophet Daniel, It was good for prophet Daniel And it’s good enough for me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It was good for the Hebrew children, It was good for the Hebrew children, It was good for the Hebrew children And it’s good enough for me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It was tried in the fiery furnace, It was tried in the fiery furnace, It was tried in the fairy furnace, It's good enough for me
